channel.title: Safer Sites Drug Checking Alerts
channel.description: Community drug checking alerts from supervised consumption sites in BC.

item.title: Fentanyl Alert — Vancouver Downtown Eastside
item.description:
Location: Vancouver, BC

Substances: Fentanyl, Benzodiazepines

Composition: Fentanyl (72.4%), Etizolam (18.1%), Caffeine (9.5%)

Lab Source: BCCDC Drug Checking Service

Guidance: Do not use alone. Use fentanyl test strips before use. Start with a small amount.

item.title: Methamphetamine Supply Alert — Surrey
item.description:
Location: Surrey, BC

Substances: Methamphetamine, Fentanyl

Composition: Methamphetamine (85.0%), Fentanyl (15.0%)

Lab Source: Forensic Drug Checking Laboratory

Guidance: Fentanyl detected in stimulant supply. Use fentanyl test strips. Have naloxone nearby.

item.title: Unknown Substance Alert — Kelowna
item.description:
Location: Kelowna, BC

Substances: Cocaine, Unknown adulterant

Full composition analysis pending. Exercise caution.

Guidance: Avoid use until further testing complete. Contact harm reduction services.

item.title: Heroin Supply Warning — Victoria
item.description:
Location: Victoria, BC

Substances: Heroin, Carfentanil

Composition: Heroin (60.0%), Carfentanil (2.5%), Cutting agent (37.5%)

Lab Source: Vancouver Island Drug Checking

Guidance: Extreme danger. Carfentanil detected. Do not use alone. Keep naloxone immediately accessible.

item.title: Benzodiazepine Contamination Alert — Abbotsford
item.description:
Location: Abbotsford, BC

Substances: Etizolam, Clonazolam

Composition: Etizolam (55.3%), Clonazolam (44.7%)

Lab Source: Fraser Health Drug Checking

Guidance: Benzo-only supply detected. Naloxone will not reverse benzodiazepine overdose. Call 911 immediately for overdose response.

item.title: Fentanyl Spike — Prince George
item.description:
Location: Prince George, BC

Substances: Fentanyl

Composition: Fentanyl (91.2%), Unknown (8.8%)

Guidance: Extremely high potency fentanyl detected. Do not use alone. Start with a very small amount.

item.title: MDMA Adulterant Warning — Nanaimo
item.description:
Location: Nanaimo, BC

Substances: MDMA, Methylone

Composition: MDMA (48.5%), Methylone (51.5%)

Lab Source: Island Drug Checking Network

Guidance: More Methylone than MDMA detected. Effects may differ from expected. Stay hydrated but do not over-drink water.

item.title: Opioid Supply Alert
item.description:
Highly potent opioid supply detected at multiple community sites.

Substances: Fentanyl, Nitazene analog

Composition: Fentanyl (65.0%), Nitazene (35.0%)

Lab Source: Provincial Drug Checking Network

Guidance: Novel nitazene analog detected. Naloxone may require multiple doses. Call 911 immediately.

item.title: Cocaine Adulterant Alert — Burnaby
item.description:
Location: Burnaby, BC

Substances: Cocaine, Levamisole

Composition: Cocaine (70.2%), Levamisole (29.8%)

Lab Source: Metro Vancouver Drug Checking

Guidance: Levamisole detected. Long-term use may suppress white blood cell count. Seek medical advice.

item.title: Undated Supply Alert
item.description:
Location: Vancouver, BC

Substances: Fentanyl

Alert issued without timestamp. Should be skipped by parser.

item.title: Tranq Supply Alert — Kamloops
item.description:
Location: Kamloops, BC

Substances: Fentanyl, Xylazine

Composition: Fentanyl (58.0%), Xylazine (42.0%)

Lab Source: Interior Health Drug Checking

Guidance: Xylazine (tranq) detected. Naloxone does not reverse xylazine sedation. Monitor breathing. Call 911.
